name: Potstickers
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix all ingredients together.
2. Fill wonton wrappers with approximately 1 - 1 1/2 teaspoons of filling and press firmly in wonton press. Moisten edges for better adhering.
3. Heat vegetable oil (add 1 drop of sesame oil) in a pan over medium heat. Sauté the wontons until bottoms are golden.
4. Add enough chicken broth to cover the wontons. Cover and simmer for approximately 8-10 minutes.
5. Serve immediately with dipping sauce consisting of: 2 parts soy sauce, 1 part rice vinegar, a little grated ginger, and some chopped green onion.
